sys_variable_value.value: Exception occurred: Tasker Email Routing flow

sys_element_mapping.value: An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. Ensure (1) the email route with a matching "Sender Email" email address {{Inbound Email_1.from_address}}" is present. (2) If present, ensure the route is marked "Active".

An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. Ensure (1) the email route with a matching "Sender Email" email address {{Inbound Email_1.from_address}}" is present. (2) If present, ensure the route is marked "Active".

action_type.display_value: Get Email Route ID with Sender Email

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Get email route ID based on sender email

sys_variable_value.value: Tasker Configuration Required: Email Routing feature

sys_element_mapping.value:
Attention Tasker Application Administrators,

Configuration required: An email sent to the Tasker application triggered the Email Routing feature.

An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. An entry with the "From Address" of the email is required in the "Sender Email" field for this feature to execute.

 

Generated in response to the email with Subject:

Flow Variables➛Email Subject

Email From:

Trigger➛From address

 

Suggested Task (x_153465_discovert_suggested_taskers) record sys_id:

 9➛Suggested Task Record

sys_element_mapping.value: An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. Ensure (1) the email route with a matching "Sender Email" email address {{Inbound Email_1.from_address}}" is present. (2) If present, ensure the route is marked "Active".

An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. Ensure (1) the email route with a matching "Sender Email" email address {{Inbound Email_1.from_address}}" is present. (2) If present, ensure the route is marked "Active".

sys_variable_value.value: Exception occurred: Tasker Email Routing flow
Tasker Configuration Required: Email Routing feature

sys_element_mapping.value:
Attention Tasker Application Administrators,

Configuration required: An email sent to the Tasker application triggered the Email Routing feature.

An email match was not found in the Tasker Email Routing table. An entry with the "From Address" of the email is required in the "Sender Email" field for this feature to execute.

 

Generated in response to the email with Subject:

Flow Variables➛Email Subject

Email From:

Trigger➛From address

 

Suggested Task (x_153465_discovert_suggested_taskers) record sys_id:
